summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WellTrack Phase 2 Super Admin Backend. All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). Tested all super admin endpoints: bootstrap, auth, schools CRUD/provisioning, school admin management, impersonation, audit log, and super admin CRUD.

minor.issue: Demo school (legacy) missing school_id field - needs data migration to add school_id for consistency

action_items: Consider adding school_id to demo school record for consistency (data migration)
critical_code_review_comments: Super admin auth correctly uses separate cookie (sa_session_token) from school auth (session_token)
Bootstrap endpoint correctly rejects second attempt with 403
All protected endpoints correctly require authentication (401 without auth)
Password hash correctly excluded from /api/superadmin/auth/me response
School provisioning correctly creates DB, admin user, settings, uploads dir, and indexes
Slug validation working: reserved slugs rejected (400), duplicate slugs rejected (409), invalid format rejected (400)
Cannot delete own super admin account (400)
Tenant middleware correctly bypasses tenant resolution for /api/superadmin/* paths
Existing school portal still works - demo school students accessible
seed_data_creation: Test schools created during testing were archived after tests completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Super Admin Backend fully verified. All 35 tests passed. Endpoints tested: bootstrap (rejects 2nd attempt), login-email, me, logout, change-password, stats, schools CRUD (list/get/create/update/archive), school admins (list/add/remove/reset-password), impersonate, audit log, super-admins CRUD. Demo school is legacy data without school_id - use mooroopna (sch_c7aa9eecd82f) for testing school_id-dependent features. Super admin uses sa_session_token cookie, school admin uses session_token cookie.
passed_tests: POST /api/superadmin/auth/login-email - super admin login with cookie
GET /api/superadmin/auth/me - returns super admin profile without password_hash
GET /api/superadmin/schools - lists all schools with enriched stats
GET /api/superadmin/schools/{school_id} - returns school detail with live stats
POST /api/superadmin/schools - provisions new school (creates DB, admin, settings, indexes)
GET /api/superadmin/schools/{school_id}/admins - lists school users without password_hash
GET /api/superadmin/super-admins - lists super admins without password_hash
All protected endpoints require auth (15 endpoints tested)
Demo school portal still works - /api/students returns 16 students
Mooroopna school accessible via X-Tenant-Slug header
